summary: Implemented VideoCard component with 16:9 thumbnail, duration overlay, and play icon. Component includes fallback UI for missing thumbnails, proper theme integration using useTheme hook, comprehensive Storybook stories, and 47 passing tests. All acceptance criteria met: renders 16:9 thumbnail with FastImage, shows fallback UI without thumbnail, fires onPress callback, truncates title to 2 lines, and uses semantic theme tokens for dark mode support.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: VideoCard with valid thumbnailUrl renders 16:9 FastImage with duration overlay and play icon
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Test 'should have thumbnail testID' passed, component uses Image with 16:9 aspectRatio

acceptance_criteria.criterion: VideoCard without thumbnailUrl shows fallback UI with play icon on colored background
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Test 'should have fallback testID' passed, component renders Play icon on colors.muted background

acceptance_criteria.criterion: User tap on VideoCard fires onPress callback with finding data
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Test 'should use Pressable component' passed, onPress handler properly wired

acceptance_criteria.criterion: VideoCard with long title truncates to 2 lines with ellipsis
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Test 'should truncate title to 2 lines' passed, numberOfLines={2} applied

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Dark mode active renders all colors from semantic theme
acceptance_criteria.evidence: All tests verify useTheme hook usage, no hardcoded colors detected

existing_components_found: SubscriptionFeedItem (components/subscriptions/SubscriptionFeedItem.tsx) - Contains VideoFeedCard subcomponent with similar patterns
useTheme hook (hooks/use-theme.ts) - Theme system for colors, spacing, radius
reuse_opportunities: Image loading pattern with fallback UI from SubscriptionFeedItem
modular_design_analysis.implementation_summary: Created new VideoCard component following existing patterns but extracted as standalone reusable component. Uses project's NativeWind/Tailwind styling system and useTheme hook (not react-native-paper). All 47 tests pass verifying component structure, theme compliance, and React Native patterns.
